data.content: Implementation review APPROVED. All 6 acceptance criteria met. Quality gates pass: lint 0 errors (1 pre-existing React Compiler warning), tsc clean, 2330/2330 tests pass, build succeeds. Prior review issues resolved: regex/dotAll test file removed, unrelated settings-pools changes removed. Clean diff: persistence module with defensive localStorage handling, form integration via watch()+useEffect, Clear button in BeatFormActions, clearDraft on submit/createMore. FormField and ProfileInfoDialog correctly extracted to separate files.
